name: Billingham Eventer MKII Camera Bag
description: Carry and protect your camera and laptop with the sage fibrenyte and chocolate leather Eventer MKII Camera Bag from Billingham. This bag is ideal for carrying mid-size DSLR, mirrorless, and rangefinder cameras, some medium format cameras with lenses attached, and extra lenses.

features.Key Features:: Made from Weather-Resistant Material | Padded Laptop Slip Fits 14" Macbook Pro | Fits DSLR/Mirrorless Cameras with Lenses | Dual Quick Release Front Straps | Removable Padded Insert with Dividers
features.What’s in the box?: Billingham Eventer MKII Camera Bag (Sage Fibrenyte and Chocolate Leather) | Billingham SP50 Shoulder Strap Pad (with Antique Studs) | Olive Padded Divider Insert | Chocolate Eventer MKII Front Straps | Limited 5-Year Manufacturer Warranty
